chunks.title: Fall of Jerusalem and Exile
chunks.reason: Narrative account of the city's capture, Zedekiah's flight, and the distribution of the remaining people.

chunks.title: Jeremiah Released
chunks.reason: Continuation of the narrative focusing on Nebuchadnezzar's command regarding Jeremiah and his release to Gedaliah.

chunks.title: Oracle to Ebed-melech
chunks.reason: Divine message delivered through Jeremiah promising deliverance to the Ethiopian eunuch.
